properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I may believe my mind can conceive A love is closer than a brother's love The bond that we share Can't be earned anywhere It's something I just don't deserve

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I'm feeling all alone I call my brother on the phone And he'll drop everything To say a pray'r with me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is a friend Who sticks closer than a brother Through thick and thin He is always by your side Unfailing love Is what you will discover When you find a friend Who sticks closer than a brother

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Does life have you drained Are you walkin' in the rain Feeling like somebody's let you down Though you're out on your own You don't have to walk alone His love is closer than the air you breathe

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: That's the beauty of it all And all you have to do is call And like a brother He'll be there to comfort you

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And that's the beauty of it all And all you have to do is call And like a brother He'll be there to comfort you

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: There is a friend Who sticks closer than a brother Through thick and thin He is always by your side Unfailing love Is what you will discover

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: When you find a friend When you find a friend When you find a friend Who is closer than a brother
